name: GOLFTEC Eden Prairie
about: GOLFTEC Eden Prairie offers data-driven golf instruction using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors. The facility provides personalized coaching, club fitting, and practice sessions in a high-tech training environment. Services are designed for players of all skill levels, with a focus on measurable improvement through swing analysis and on-course lesson strategies. The brand emphasizes a proven system for game improvement with a team of PGA award-winning coaches.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION technology for precise swing analysis
Launch monitors provide immediate feedback on ball flight and club data
Certified PGA coaches with a team-based approach to improvement
On-course lessons for applying skills in real-world conditions
Practice memberships with access to training bays and video feedback

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides club rentals and fitting services, though you can bring your own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or beverages are allowed, as GOLFTEC focuses on a professional training environment.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Virtual rounds vary depending on simulator use, but typical sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on the number of holes.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes young golfers with age-appropriate instruction.
